top_signals.title: Mongolia Reaffirms One China Policy at Meeting, China Says
top_signals.summary: Mongolian President Khurelsukh Ukhnaa said Mongolia firmly adheres to the One China principle in a meeting with China’s Foreign Minister Wang Yi in Ulaanbaatar on June 13, according to a statement from China’s Foreign Ministry.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cook, The Opportunities and Risks AI Presents for the Economy and Financial System

top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: AI is disrupting investment
top_signals.summary: The technology is leading to a fundamental shift in the way investors allocate funds and diversify risks across every asset class
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
